title: Settings
description: Manage your account settings and set e-mail preferences.

profile.title: Profile
profile.desc: This is how others will see you on the site.
profile.userCodeDesc: Your unique identifier from the system.
profile.nicknameDesc: Display name from your account profile.
profile.emailPlaceholder: Select a verified email to display
profile.emailDesc: Placeholder field — not synced with API yet. Manage emails in email settings.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a little bit about yourself
profile.bioDesc: Placeholder field — not synced with API yet.
profile.urlsDesc: Placeholder field — not synced with API yet.

account.title: Account
account.desc: View basic information about the account you're signed in with.
account.userCodeDesc: Your account number in the system, used to identify you.
account.nicknameDesc: The name shown in the app.
account.avatarDesc: Your profile picture, shown in the header and other places.

avatarUpload.desc: JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF up to 10MB. Preview before confirming to upload and save.
avatarUpload.previewHint: Previewing — confirm to upload and update your avatar.

toast.failed: Failed to upload avatar. Please try again.
toast.invalidType: Only JPG, PNG, WebP, and GIF are supported.

account.rolesDesc: Your roles in this system determine which features you can use.
account.usernameDesc: Your main account name used to sign in.
account.accountsDesc: Sign-in methods linked to your account, such as username or social login.
account.loadFailed: Could not load account information. Please try again later.

toast.updateFailed: Failed to save. Please try again later.

password.title: Password
password.desc: Change your password here. After saving, you'll need to use the new password next time you sign in.
password.newDesc: Must be at least 8 characters long.

validation.newMin: New password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.newMax: New password must not exceed 128 characters.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.desc: Customize the appearance of the app. Automatically switch between day and night themes.

form.fontDesc: Set the font you want to use in the dashboard.
form.themeDesc: Select the theme for the dashboard.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.desc: Configure where toast notifications appear on the screen.
notifications.positionDesc: Choose where notifications pop up. Click an option to preview.

display.title: Display
display.desc: Turn items on or off to control what's displayed in the app.

form.sidebarDesc: Select the items you want to display in the sidebar.

validation.selectOne: You have to select at least one item.
